title: Fix an off-by-one in the date-range utility
instruction: daysBetween(start, end) is returning one day too few for ranges that span a month boundary, and a failing test reproduces it. Find the root cause, fix it without breaking the passing cases, and keep the fix minimal. Explain the cause in the commit message.

criteria.guidance: Is the root cause fixed (not the test weakened) and do all cases pass?
Is the fix minimal and the cause clearly explained?
